metadata.title: About — Perrine Huon, Freelance Web Developer
metadata.description: Discover the journey of Perrine Huon, a freelance web developer specialized in custom website creation. My approach, my values, and why choose me.
metadata.ogTitle: About — Perrine Huon, Freelance Web Developer
metadata.ogDescription: Discover the journey of Perrine Huon, a freelance web developer specialized in custom website creation.

hero.name: Perrine Huon
hero.title: Freelance Web Developer
hero.description: Passionate about web and design, I create custom websites that combine aesthetics, performance, and SEO. My goal: to give every project an online presence that matches its ambition.

parcours.title: My journey
paragraphs: After several years in the professional world, I made the choice to devote myself entirely to my passion: web development. A carefully considered career change, driven by the desire to create digital tools that have a real impact for my clients.

Trained in the most modern web technologies (Next.js, React, TypeScript), I specialized in creating custom websites for SMEs, independent professionals, and associations. My approach combines technical rigor with a sensitivity for design and user experience.
Today, I'm a freelancer and I support my clients from A to Z: from strategic thinking to going live, including design, development, and SEO optimization.

values.title: Listening & Understanding
values.description: Every project starts with careful listening to your needs, your business, and your goals. No one-size-fits-all solution: I build with you.

values.title: Artisanal Quality
values.description: Every line of code is thoughtfully crafted. No generic template or page builder: your site is created custom, pixel by pixel.

values.title: Total Transparency
values.description: You know exactly where your project stands at every stage. Clear communication, deadlines met, no surprises on the invoice.

values.title: Performance & SEO
values.description: A beautiful site is not enough, it must be fast and visible. Every project is optimized for Google and to offer the best user experience.

items.title: Single point of contact
items.description: One point of contact from start to finish. No salesperson, no intermediate project manager: you speak directly with the person who creates your site.

items.title: Modern technologies
items.description: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS: the same technologies used by web giants, adapted to your project for optimal performance.

items.title: SEO integrated from design
items.description: SEO is not an afterthought. It's considered from the architecture phase and integrated into every page for maximum visibility.

items.title: Personalized support
items.description: Beyond site delivery, I support you with training, strategic advice, and responsive support for your peace of mind.

items.title: Transparent pricing
items.description: A clear and detailed quote before starting. No hidden fees or surprises. You know exactly what you're paying for and what you're getting.

items.title: Measurable results
items.description: Every site is delivered with analytics tools. You can track your visitors, your conversions, and the return on investment of your online presence.

cta.title: Want to work together?
cta.description: Let's discuss your project over a first free consultation with no commitment. I'll be delighted to support you in creating your website.
